reviews.review_title: Can I do a video on this?
reviews.review_description: I’m a YouTuber, with both a normal gaming channel and a horror channel, just by watching the trailer I can already tell this is video recording worthy. However with games like fnaf help wanted and fnaf help wanted 2 they don’t give me the game’s audio in the video and all you hear is my voice and and my breathing. So I’m just curious if it’ll do that and I have to find another game like it, only on PC or console…
Plz make a part 2, 3, and 4 of this game. Kind of like FNAF but rip off version, but it still pretty good.

This game is extremely intense, putting you in the dreadful situation of having 2/3 of the whole cast (6/9 animatronics) attempting to kill you at the same time. Uses VR mechanics really well having to crouch and throw stuff instead of just clicking buttons. I am thinking about trying to beat lights out mode, nightmare mode, and the custom night all max. It's cheaper than help wanted (It's free) way funnier and more intense. It's gotta be one, if not the best VR horror experience I have seen. And the soundtrack? Yeah they are peak (Specially the night 5 soundtrack). If you are thinking about getting it, don't keep thinking, just get it, try it, and if you don't like it, it's okay, it was free and you can uninstall it easily. Just give it a try, I promise it's worth it
It was creepy, a knockoff, and everything was messed up nobody was showing up on cameras. But it is a great way to scare a sibling
You created my autism ￼

reviews.review_title: Cheaper than help wanted, but so awesome
reviews.review_description: This game is like five nights at Freddy’s. However, it only has three animatronics, but still very creepy. Same jumpscares as help wanted (fnaf vr). This game (as I labeled cheaper) is actually free! (HW is 30$). Check this game out. Fun time killer, with a very unnerving beginning cutscene(similar to @battington on YouTube).
Very scary love it
Just play it.
I am gonna say for some people can play the game but me nah to spooky
This game is amazing! It is very scary and fun. And I would like there to be more like this game, like pd 2(short for polardread 2) and pd 3. Download it’s worth it!

developer_response.body: Hey! As cool as that would be, I am devoting my time to other development ventures right now! I recently released Shipwrecked 64 on Steam, but there will be another VR game from me and my team down the line. Thanks for playing! :D

reviews.review_description: i regret getting HW i could just gotten this
It’s scary asf

reviews.review_title: The best fnaf fan game on vr
reviews.review_description: I love the immersive gameplay the game doesn't require a hud witch makes the game even more immersive and the fact that you can't keep the vent closed is really great the designs were reused from a older game but still 🔥
GOATED game it brings fear every time I play it and Perry scares me the most

reviews.review_title: The most amazing single-player vr horror
reviews.review_description: This is absolutely so good!! I played this a few weeks ago and oh my. The stress that implies on u when u have to check the vents behind u often, crouch when slushbear runs into the room and listen out for audio cues AND throw objects at She.. Just absolutely a masterpiece. I'm a scaredy-cat so this gives me the jumps. The jumpscares are definitely okay, and the gameplay is unbelievably amazing. I first discovered this off a video talking about alternates for games, and this was apparently a free alternative of fnaf vr help wanted. And oh my gosh.. for a free game this is so good.. Everything like the animatronic design is just chefs kiss. Anyways ima end here because this has became a entire rant lol

reviews.review_title: Fun, scary, hard and good if you can’t a
reviews.review_description: I just got the game, not even an hour ago and I’ve been playing it for a while and it’s way more fun and way more hard. The one downside that I found was sometimes you can’t throw an object hard enough to where It won’t￼ actually hit the animatronic on the wall ￼￼ and the wine bottles break very easily even if I put them down lightly they still break sometimes and the paths of animatronics are predictable, but those are all the bad things about the game. I haven’t found another bad thing and just with those couple of annoying things and bugs I couldn’t find anything else bad the thing I like is compared to Fnaf one there’s like half a amount of rooms which makes the game way harder and funner. This game is recommended to people that like fast pace, games and fnaf 9.5 out of 10 it would’ve been a 10 out of 10 if it weren’t for those annoying couple of things I said at the start but if those get fixed or changed 10 out of 10, I completely recommend if you can’t afford help wanted or you have Beat help wanted ￼￼￼￼

Hello!
So I got this game a year ago on my quest 2 and it was extremely scary and fun. This year I just git a meta quest 3S for christmas and wanted to play this game on the 3S. So I instal it and go in the game. And it's black for a few seconds, and it crashes. Everything I try to enter the game it just takes me out. I tried Uninstalling and reinstalling it and still did nothing. I reset my headset constantly and still doesn't work. It says it's available on the Meta Quest 3s, but not for mine. Do you know why this is happening? Is it the game? Is it my vr headset? I don't know. But please respond when you can. Thank you!!!

developer_response.body: Hey! Give this another try maybe? I've just updated the game with Quest 3 support.

reviews.review_description: This is an amazing game. It is terrifying in every single way and it spies up to five nights at Freddy Freddy’s Bonnet genre. It’s really fun and the death screen when you die is amazing. It’s terrifying.￼
All the fnaf games cost money but this one is the best fnaf fan game that cost free

reviews.review_title: Probably the scariest game I ever played
reviews.review_description: I've been playing fnaf games since 2014 and this is by far the scariest one I've witnessed so far. To make the game a little scarier make the jumpscares a little faster because slow ones aren't scary. Also please make a sequel for this

This game has offered an experience to me like no other, everything from how you play to small details like the animatronics voice lines after they kill you is amazing. Not once have I considered buying a supporter pack but I believe the developers deserve it. It’s genuinely SELFLESS that this game is free.

By the way… Developers… if you ever add content or make another game and need voice actors, hit me up. 2312900470

It is so scary, I'm on Thursday now. Don't think I can play it cuz it's so stressful and terrifying. Plus the death screen is really creepy and cool. Especially if u get killed but the seal in the vent. I would buy this game tbh but please add more. Idk anything, maybe game modes like FNAF help wanted or just some more nights and animatronics. Over all amazing game. I also love the basement mini game, it is just the screech the mole makes when you break a bottle. Gives me a hear attack.

reviews.review_description: It's so scary  😨  to play I like the jump  scares
I just got a new credit card

I am not kidding when I say this, this is the best vr game I have ever played. Amazing concept, great character models, to me, this is so much more then a fnaf fan game. This is something Much more. If you get this a PlayStation VR port, that’s a hit game right there. I never write reviews, but this needed one. Absolutely amazing. Also, I have a idea, maybe add a audio lure, like FNaF 3 but it only works on slushbear, and the wolf (sorry I don’t know the name) and, when more levels are out, maybe you could make destroyed versions of the animatronics. Plus, if you could, add a little hedgehog hat on the desk. (I know it’s really weird but it’s my favorite animal) anyways, amazing game!

reviews.review_title: Just as scary as FNaF help wanted!
reviews.review_description: I love FNaF, and the first time I got FNaF vr, I got too scared to do dark rooms and night terrors, and this game, on the first night, gave me the vibe of it being a FNaF fan game, it is amazingly well done! Definitely a game to get if FNaF help wanted is to expensive to you.
Plz ad multiplayer 🌜🌛🌻🌎🌹🌎🥀🌒🥀🌍🌎🌎🌎🌻🌓☄️

I got this game a while ago, but never really played it, being that its terrifying. I was wondering if you (whoever made it) could add like a chicken mode, where its a lot brighter and the jumpscares are slowed down a lot. That would get me to play the game a lot more. Or just to be funny you could make a actual chicken robot that looks like a rubber chicken. But great game and keep it up!

The jumpscares are great and I love all the game mechanics for the characters. The gloomy atmosphere is great, but I do think it is a bit to dark. Also, something cool for the game would be adding some details to the hands. Overall, great game and I highly recommend you buy it.

developer_response.body:
Hello, thank you for your feedback!
If you click the "A" button, or click down on the thumbsticks, it enables your flashlight!
Hope this helps, please reach out if you have any more questions or concerns!
